evals.prompt: Check if this article is AI-generated: [paste 300-word article]
evals.expected_output: Should analyze the text via Genuino API and return classification (AI/HUMAN), probability score, and writing style.
assertions: Runs analyze.py with the provided text

evals.prompt: What's the AI score for https://example.com/blog-post?
evals.expected_output: Should fetch the URL content via Jina Reader and analyze it with Genuino.
assertions: Fetches URL content via Jina Reader

evals.prompt: Check my article for AI content and tell me what to fix.
evals.expected_output: Should analyze with --guidelines flag and show specific sections to humanize.
